creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
>  But there is a different way - we can get IP address by processing $3
>  in MPD's interface "up script".
>  
>  Here is my script:
>  
>  #! /bin/sh -
>  
>  route_cmd="/sbin/route"
>  awk_cmd="/usr/bin/awk"
>  echo_cmd="/bin/echo"
>  
>  ${route_cmd} delete default
>  ${route_cmd} add default `${echo_cmd} $3 | ${awk_cmd} -F / '{print $1}'`
>  
>  I think that PR may be closed now.

Hi Anton,

thanks for providing a workaround for MPD users.

--
olli
